name: education_staffing_model_assigns_millhaven_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is facing an escalating incident tied to education staffing model assigns millhaven car fair. agents.name: Camila Park

forced_choice.call_to_action: A decision is required in the next 60 minutes with partial evidence. Zara Ibrahim must choose an authorization approach in Education under care vs fairness. What does Zara Ibrahim do?
